pi_items.source: Task description explicitly lists this exact name
Task description explicitly states 'Listview items per page: 50'
Task description explicitly requires checking the box to lock user homepages
setup_task.sh generates the mock logo file via ImageMagick at this exact path

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the required system configuration values (System Name "Meridian Wholesale CRM", listview entries 50, and locked homepage) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. Additionally, verified that setup_task.sh dynamically generates a synthetic company logo using ImageMagick at the expected path /home/ga/Documents/meridian_logo.png.
